prompt: Create a new cultivation monster concept for Samsara Ascension inspired by the TDD stage bosses and thunder-tribulation setting. Design a readable enemy that feels like a late-run boss or elite. It should visually pair with the jade cultivator art style but remain clearly hostile.
scene: perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key background only, one uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation
subject: tribulation thunder demon general, humanoid boss silhouette, blackened armor plates cracked with blue-white lightning veins, long tattered robe panels, horn-like crown, floating thunder talismans close to the body, clawed gauntlets, stern masked face, compact storm aura, readable as a xianxia boss monster
style: clean HD hand-painted 2D game enemy concept, polished fantasy RPG asset, crisp silhouette, controlled painterly detail, simplified fine details, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art
composition: full body visible, top-down 45-degree three-quarter RPG view, battle-ready idle pose, centered, generous padding, stable feet anchor, subject occupies about 70 percent of the canvas
lighting: storm-lit rim light, thunder glow from internal cracks, dramatic but gameplay-readable contrast
palette: charcoal black, storm blue, electric cyan, muted silver, faint ember violet accents kept minimal; avoid magenta in the subject
materials: forged dark metal, scorched cloth, lightning energy fissures, talisman paper with metallic edges
constraints: single monster only; no scene background; no UI; no text; no watermark; no extra enemies; no oversized detached lightning arcs; keep aura compact and inside the canvas; maintain strong game-readable silhouette; simplify ornamental detail while preserving premium hand-painted look
negative: busy backdrop, giant wings, giant floating debris, photoreal gore, hyper-detailed textures, cropped limbs, chibi proportions, cartoon comedy mood
